name: Creamy Ham Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups fresh or frozen broccoli florets, thawed
1 1/2 Cups KRAFT Shredded Cheddar Cheese, divided
1 1/2 Cups rotini pasta, cooked and drained
1/2 Cup MIRACLE WHIP LIGHT Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. COMBINE all ingredients except for 1/2 cup of cheese in a large bowl.
3. POUR the mixture into a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish and sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
4. BAKE for 30 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Optionally, top with seasoned croutons if desired. Serves 8.
MICROWAVE INSTRUCTIONS:
1. FOLLOW the steps above to prepare the casserole.
2. MICROWAVE on HIGH for 8 to 10 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Optionally, top with seasoned croutons if desired.
